verdict.description: Concise outcome label such as pass, needs-work, blocked, implemented, or recommendation.

summary.description: One compact paragraph with the main result.

evidence.description: Concrete files, commands, observations, or source references used to reach the verdict.

confidence.description: Low, medium, high, or an explicit uncertainty statement.

next_command.description: The next concrete command if one is needed; null when no command is needed.

verification.description: Verification steps run, skipped, or still needed.
